metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_1016
metadata.comment:
Rationale: The adhesive interactions of the synaptic adhesion molecule SynCAM 1 were mapped in this study.
The homophilic binding of SynCAM 1 extracellular domains in trans is shown in Fig. 5, using a bead aggregation assay and a cell-cell contact analysis.
Testing heterophilic interactions, the affinity chromatography results in Fig. 6A show that heterologously expressed SynCAM 1 retains not only SynCAM 1 but also SynCAM 2 from adult rat forebrain extracts. Beads coated with SynCAMs 2 and 3 each retain SynCAM 1 from forebrain extracts. Heterophilic interactions of SynCAM 1 and SynCAM 2 are further supported by the analysis of cell-cell contact assembly in Fig. 6B. All interactions are Ca2+ independent.. Experimental description: "Sequences encoding full-length SynCAM 2 (splice product 2) (Biederer, 2006), SynCAM 3 (splice product 2), and SynCAM 4 were amplified from a mousebrain cDNA library prepared at 9-11 weeks of age (Clontech #639400)."
